Class BasePlayer

java.lang.Object
Character.BasePlayer
Direct Known Subclasses:
BasePlayerProductionTest.TestPlayer, GameSessionTest.TestPlayer, GymBro, Nerd, NormalGuy, Otaku
public abstract class BasePlayer extends Object
this class is the baseClass for PlayerType like Gymbro , Nerd , NormalGuy , Otaku that have same method to use with.

    setEducation(int educationValue)
    set Education value if education more than 200 set this to 200
    void

    set Happiness value if happiness more than 500 set this to 500 and if happiness less than 0 set this to 0
    void

    set Health value if Health is more than 200 set this to 200 and if Health is less than 0 set this to 0

    study(int eduGain, int staminaCost)
    study method for decrease stamina , health , happiness but increase education stat if less than staminaCost player cant do work
    void
    walk()
    method to use for walk in this game by using stamina to walk
    boolean
    work(int staminaCost, int moneyGain)
    work method for decrease stamina when Player work by using staminaCost , increase money player by using moneyGain and check stamina condition if less than staminaCost player cant do work

    • work

      public boolean work(int staminaCost, int moneyGain)
